property.name: java.library.path
property.value:

odejs\;C:\Program Files
odejs
ode_modules
pm in;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;D:\Program Files\Php;C:\Program Files\Amazon\AWSSAMCLI;C:\Users\Admin\.amplify in;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0 in\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\Scripts\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python312\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.1.1 in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Local\Coursier\data in;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.3.3 in;C:\Users\Admin\AppData\Roaming

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate pet in sold list", "Cross Endpoint Validation"](1)
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Failed to load class "org.slf4j.impl.StaticLoggerBinder". SLF4J: Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#StaticLoggerBinder for further details. log4j:WARN No appenders could be found for logger (org.apache.http.impl.conn.BasicClientConnectionManager). log4j:WARN Please initialize the log4j system properly. log4j:WARN See http://logging.apache.org/log4j/1.2/faq.html#noconfig for more info.

testcase.name: runScenario["CRUD operations on pet", "Pet Lifecycle"](2)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: CRUD operations on pet &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/pet.feature:3&amp#27;[0m Request method: POST Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": 16346, stepDefinitions.PetSteps.getPet()&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mvalidate pet details&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PetSteps.validatePet()&amp#27;[0m Request method: PUT Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI delete the pet&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.PetSteps.deletePet()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Validate available pets count", "Inventory"](3)
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Validate available pets count &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/store.feature:3&amp#27;[0m Request method: GET Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/store/inventory Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI get store inventory&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.StoreSteps.getInventory()&amp#27;[0m Available: 554 &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI count available pets&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.StoreSteps.countPets()&amp#27;[0m Request method: GET Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/pet/findByStatus?status=available Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mvalidate with findByStatus API&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.StoreSteps.validateCount()&amp#27;[0m

testcase.name: runScenario["Invalid user operations", "User Negative Testing"](4)
testcase.system-out:
Scenario: Invalid user operations &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/features/user.feature:3&amp#27;[0m Request method: POST Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/user Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: { "id": 0, "username": "testuser", "email": "invalid_email", "password": "12345" } HTTP/1.1 200 OK Date: Thu, 02 Apr 2026 04:12:08 GMT Content-Type: application/json Transfer-Encoding: chunked Connection: keep-alive Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * Access-Control-Allow-Methods: GET, POST, DELETE, PUT Access-Control-Allow-Headers: Content-Type, api_key, Authorization Server: Jetty(9.2.9.v20150224)
{ "code": 200, "type": "unknown", "message": "9223372036854762205" } &amp#27;[32mWhen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI create user with invalid email&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.UserSteps.createUser()&amp#27;[0m Request method: GET Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/user/unknown123 Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> &amp#27;[32mThen &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mI get non existing user&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.UserSteps.getUser()&amp#27;[0m Request method: GET Request URI: https://petstore.swagger.io/v2/user/login?username=wrong&password=wrong Proxy: <none> Request params: <none> Query params: <none> Form params: <none> Path params: <none> Headers: Accept=*/* Content-Type=application/json Cookies: <none> Multiparts: <none> Body: <none> Login Response: {"code":200,"type":"unknown","message":"logged in user session:1775103130817"} &amp#27;[32mAnd &amp#27;[0m&amp#27;[32mvalidate login failure&amp#27;[0m &amp#27;[90m# stepDefinitions.UserSteps.loginFail()&amp#27;[0m
